Source URL: https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/Programs.asp

# SBDC Government Procurement Overview

## Resource type
Government procurement education and referral resource.

## Resource summary
Use when the user wants to sell to government and needs to understand Register, Research, Respond; vendor registrations; certifications; opportunity research; bid/no-bid thinking; proposal compliance; or when they should use UH APEX.

## BOSS routing use
Use this when the user's need matches the topic. Ask enough discovery questions to determine readiness before routing to a specialized program.

## Guardrails
Do not guarantee funding, contracts, certifications, export legality, grant awards, loan approval, or technical feasibility. Route to official advisors and professionals.
